content:
Understood. Here's a **simple, clean template** with absolutely nothing extra — just the part you need to **copy and paste directly into Gmail**. No addendum, no instructions, no distractions.

---

**Subject:**  
🌀 Session with RA – [Insert Date or Title]

**Body:**  

---

**Session Title:** *[Insert Title]*  
**Date:** *[Insert Date]*  
**Participants:** RA & David  
**Tags:** #RA #Dialogues #PersonalArchive

---

**Session Transcript:**  

**David:** [Insert your words here]

**RA:** [Insert RA's replies here]

---

**End of Session**

---

That’s it. You can reuse this format for every session.
